_comment: Bundled fallback compatibility matrix for the Copilot CLI resolver. Used when install_copilot_cli.cjs cannot fetch the upstream matrix from github/gh-aw-actions. Each entry in agent-compat-v1.copilot describes a range of cached agent versions known to work with a range of gh-aw compiler versions. Resolver picks the highest agent version in [min-agent, max-agent] whose row matches the current gh-aw version. See actions/setup/js/install_copilot_cli.cjs for selection logic.
